creator: hunt@cs.utexas.edu
text:
With Apple (MB869LL/A) keyboard attached, boot freezes
after the following line is printed:

ochi0:[ITHREAD]

Using an Apple mouse works fine -- so do other USB mice.

Fix: 

I couldn't find a fix.  One Google search suggested
disabling "Legacy USB Mode" in BIOS.  This prevents the
boot process from even starting no matter what USB
keyboard I tried.
How-To-Repeat: Boot with Apple (MB869LL/A) attached.  When using
MicroSoft or Dell keyboards, boot process succeeds.
